user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new physical resource with type, location, capacity and contact details, so that orientation sessions can be booked into appropriate venues
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Physical Resources screen; When I click Add new physical resource and enter the resource details; Then the new resource is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view physical resources in a list showing resource, type, location, capacity, contact person, department, mobile and email, so that I can review available orientation venues
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Physical Resources screen; When the page loads; Then resources are listed with all configured columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing physical resource, so that venue details and contacts stay accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Physical Resources screen; When I click Edit on a resource row; Then I can modify and save the resource details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to record the capacity of a physical resource, so that I do not schedule orientation sessions beyond a venue's limit
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a physical resource; When I enter a capacity value; Then the capacity is saved with the resource

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the physical resources list and proceed to the next step or cancel, so that I can see current data and continue the setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Physical Resources screen; When I click Refresh, Next or Cancel; Then the list reloads, I advance, or I exit without saving
